infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NextPlayAI uses your camera to capture training clips and photos for your athlete profile.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NextPlayAI uses your microphone to record voice notes and video audio during training sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NextPlayAI needs access to your photo library to attach existing videos and images to a training session.

plugins.photosPermission: NextPlayAI needs access to your photos to attach media to a training session.
plugins.cameraPermission: NextPlayAI uses your camera to capture training clips and photos.
plugins.microphonePermission: NextPlayAI uses your microphone to record audio with video clips.
NextPlayAI uses your microphone to record voice notes during training sessions.
